mapper.select: select m.*, u.user_name, c.title from message m left join user u on m.user_id = u.user_id left join competition c on m.competition_id = c.competition_id where m.user_id = #{userId} and (m.message_type is null or m.message_type != 'DIRECT') and m.is_read = #{isRead} order by m.message_created_time DESC

select user_id as userId, user_name from user u where user_id in
#{id}

select m.message_id as messageId, m.sender_id as senderId, su.user_name as senderName, m.user_id as receiverId, m.message_content as messageContent, m.is_read as isRead, m.message_created_time as messageCreatedTime from message m join user su on m.sender_id = su.user_id where m.message_type = 'DIRECT' and ( (m.sender_id = #{userId} and m.user_id = #{otherUserId}) or (m.sender_id = #{otherUserId} and m.user_id = #{userId}) ) order by m.message_created_time ASC

select other_id as otherUserId, u.user_name as otherUserName, latest.last_message as lastMessage, latest.last_time as lastTime, ifnull(unread.cnt, 0) as unreadCount from ( /* 找出所有对话方，取每段对话最新一条消息 */ select other_id, substring_index(group_concat(message_content order by message_created_time desc separator '|||'), '|||', 1) as last_message, max(message_created_time) as last_time from ( /* 我收到的私信 */ select sender_id as other_id, message_content, message_created_time from message where user_id = #{userId} and message_type = 'DIRECT' union all /* 我发出的私信 */ select user_id as other_id, message_content, message_created_time from message where sender_id = #{userId} and message_type = 'DIRECT' ) all_msgs group by other_id ) latest join user u on u.user_id = latest.other_id left join ( /* 统计每个对话方发给我的未读数 */ select sender_id, count(*) as cnt from message where user_id = #{userId} and message_type = 'DIRECT' and is_read = false group by sender_id ) unread on unread.sender_id = latest.other_id order by latest.last_time DESC
